zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Watson於1500年出生在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安時，他的父親John James Ellithorpe Watson28歲，母親Agnes Young25歲。他於1517年與Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1578年1月在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾享年78歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Watson于1500年出生在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安时，他的父亲John James Ellithorpe Watson28岁，母亲Agnes Young25岁。他于1517年与Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾本沃斯结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1578年1月在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾享年78岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Watson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: patronymic meaning ‘son of Wat’, a pet form of Walter that was particularly common in Scotland and northern England. See Watt .

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Watson was born in 1500, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, his father, John James Ellithorpe Watson, was 28 and his mother, Agnes Young, was 25. He married Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks in 1517, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 7 daughters. He died in January 1578, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

fr.Stratford upon Avon, Warwickshire, Engla: Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Watson est né en 1500, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John James Ellithorpe Watson, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Young, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks en 1517, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1578, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Watson 1500 in Evesham, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John James Ellithorpe Watson 28 und seine Mutter Agnes Young 25. Er hat 1517 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1578 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Worcester, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Watson è nato il nel 1500 nel Evesham, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John James Ellithorpe Watson, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Young, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks nel 1517, nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1578, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

ja.Holme Upon Spalding More, Yorkshire, Eng: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Watsonが1500年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムで生まれた時，父John James Ellithorpe Watsonは28歳，母Agnes Youngは25歳であった。1517年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスでLady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeksと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1578年1月にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで78歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Watson(이)가 1500년 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John James Ellithorpe Watson(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Young(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1517년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1578년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.Stratford upon Avon, Warwickshire, Engla: Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Spaulding Moor, Yorkshire, England: Low Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Watson nasceu em 1500, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John James Ellithorpe Watson, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Young, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks em 1517, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1578, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Stratford upon Avon, Warwickshire, Engla: стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Watson родился в 1500 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John James Ellithorpe Watson было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Young, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks в 1517 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер январь 1578 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.Spaulding Moor, Yorkshire, England: Low Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Watson nació en 1500, en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John James Ellithorpe Watson, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes Young, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks en 1517, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en enero de 1578, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
